whenToUse.summary: A multi-question quiz used as a pre-frame bridge and segmentation tool before the main offer. Micro-commitments increase engagement; branching answers route visitors to different offer pages or email sequences based on their profile.
goals: Route by answer to the right funnel/sequence
signals: Multiple buyer types / multiple paths exist
You want higher engagement than a flat opt-in
doNotUseWhen: A single offer fits everyone (use Lead Magnet/Squeeze)
The intent is open-ended research (use Ask Campaign)

pageStructure.purpose: Promise a personalized result to earn the first click.
blocks: Social proof / number who've taken it

pageStructure.purpose: Stack micro-commitments and capture segmentation data.
blocks: Optional email gate before showing results

pageStructure.purpose: Deliver the personalized result and the matched CTA.
blocks: Matched offer / lead magnet / sales page

copyFramework.script: Survey funnel mechanics (DotCom Secrets) - a micro-commitment ladder - with the results page using the StoryBrand Plan > Call-to-Action for the matched segment.
copyFramework.notes: The first question must be effortless to earn momentum; each answer is a tiny 'yes.' The segment determines both the offer and the email path.

primaryPersonaResolved.label: The Funnel Architect
primaryPersonaResolved.author: Russell Brunson
owns_scripts: The Attractive Character (backstory, parables, character flaws, polarity)
primaryPersonaResolved.voice: Direct-response funnel mechanics; sequence the visitor from curiosity to conversion.

supportingPersonasResolved.label: The Story Brander
supportingPersonasResolved.author: Donald Miller
owns_scripts: SB7 BrandScript: Character > Problem (external/internal/philosophical) > Guide (empathy + authority) > Plan > Call to Action (direct + transitional) > Success > Failure/Stakes
StoryBrand homepage wireframe (header, stakes, value prop, guide, plan, explanatory, junk-drawer)
supportingPersonasResolved.voice: Customer is the hero; the brand is the guide. Clarity over cleverness; no dead ends.

pages: Step 3: Results page (one variant per segment)
skill44Widgets: Multi-step Survey/Quiz widget with conditional logic
automations: Route to the matched sales page
ghlBuild.notes: Store answers as contact fields and tags. Use conditional redirects per score/segment. Results pages can be cloned per segment.
